title: Remove MpiExpoFloat node from all upscale workflows (changes denoise param behavior)
description: The MpiExpoFloat node maps the user's denoise value through an exponential curve before it reaches UltimateSDUpscale. Removing it changes how the denoise parameter behaves (linear passthrough instead of expo-mapped). KREA2 upscaler already has this done (its template carries no MpiExpoFloat — confirmed: only sdxl_upscaler_template.json still uses it as of 2026-07-10), so KREA2 can be bypassed for this work. SCOPE: strip MpiExpoFloat from every upscale template that still has it and re-run the generate scripts to emit the runtime workflows. Currently that is only sdxl_upscaler_template.json (generate_sdxl.py). BLOCKED / WAITING: the user is landing the other upscale workflows (Wan etc.) first — when they land, run the corresponding generate_*.py to regenerate the templates without the node. Do NOT regenerate ahead of the user's live template edits (live save = truth, agent does structural edits only). Steps per workflow: (1) remove the MpiExpoFloat node + rewire the denoise MpiFloat straight into the consumer, (2) SYNC last_node_id/last_link_id counters after deletion (stale counters corrupt next manual connection), (3) run generate_<model>.py, (4) sanity-check the emitted t2i/upscaler runtime JSON.
